claims.text: Flowcean is a framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning.
claims.source_quote: In this paper, we present Flowcean, a novel framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning...

claims.text: Flowcean focuses on modularity and usability.
Flowcean offers various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics.
claims.source_quote: By offering various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics, our framework provides a comprehensive solution...

claims.text: Flowcean facilitates the integration of diverse learning libraries and tools within a modular and flexible architecture.
claims.source_quote: Flowcean facilitates the integration of diverse learning libraries and tools within a modular and flexible architecture...

claims.text: Flowcean ensures adaptability to a wide range of modeling tasks.
claims.source_quote: ...ensuring adaptability to a wide range of modeling tasks.

claims.text: Flowcean streamlines the process of model generation and evaluation.
claims.source_quote: ...streamlines the process of model generation and evaluation, making it more efficient and accessible.
